---
format: html
---

# Soil Microbial Data Qiime2 Pipeline Commands

Two folders labeled as soil_microbial_original and soil-microbial-work

**soil_microbial_original** original sequences

**soil-microbial-work/qiime_workflow** active working directory with data with associate working directories

-- metadata

-- results

- results/visualizations

- results/artifacts


Created a directory to place all associated data
```bash
mkdir qiime_workflow
```

Activated conda environment
```bash
conda activate qiime2_v2024.10.1
```

uploaded updated metadata file (see metadata_clean.py)
```bash
qiime metadata tabulate \
  --m-input-file metadata/Nachusa_16s_all_metadata_edited2.tsv \
  --o-visualization metadata-output/soil-metadata-viz.qzv
```
import single end forward sequences
```bash
qiime tools import \
--type MultiplexedSingleEndBarcodeInSequence \
--input-path /mnt/HDD/samanthag/soil-microbial-original/01id01NB_S1_R1_001.fastq.gz \
--output-path ./results/artifacts/multiplexed-seqs.qza
```

Demultiplexed the single-end sequences in the background
```bash
nohup \
 qiime cutadapt demux-single \
  --p-cores 16 \
  --i-seqs ./results/multiplexed-seqs.qza \
  --m-barcodes-file ./metadata/Nachusa_16s_all_metadata_edited2.tsv \
  --m-barcodes-column barcode-sequence \
  --p-error-rate 0   \
  --o-per-sample-sequences ./results/artifacts/demultiplexed-seqs.qza \
  --o-untrimmed-sequences ./results/artifacts/untrimmed-seqs.qza \
  --verbose > demultiplex-job.log 2>&1 &
```

Created a visualization demux quality plot, will trim at 273
```bash
nohup \
qiime demux summarize \
  --i-data ./results/artifacts/demultiplexed-seqs.qza \
  --o-visualization ./results/visualizations/demultiplexed-seqs.qzv \
  --p-n 20000000 > demultiplex-job-sampling-size-20mil.log 2>&1 &
```
create a deblur working directory 
```bash
mkdir HOME/soil-microbial-work/qiime_workflow/deblur
```


```bash
nohup \
qiime quality-filter q-score \
 --i-demux ./results/artifacts/demultiplexed-seqs.qza \
 --o-filtered-sequences ./deblur/demux-filtered-deblur.qza \
 --o-filter-stats ./deblur/demux-filter-stats-deblur.qza > deblur-data.log 2>&1 &
 ```

Run deblur
```bash
nohup \
qiime deblur denoise-16S \
  --i-demultiplexed-seqs ./deblur/demux-filtered-deblur.qza \
  --p-trim-length 275 \
  --p-jobs-to-start 18 \
  --o-representative-sequences ./deblur/rep-seqs-deblur.qza \
  --o-table ./deblur/table-deblur.qza \
  --p-sample-stats \
  --o-stats ./deblur/deblur-stats.qza \
  --verbose > Deblur-job.log 2>&1 &
```

Create visualizations 
```bash
qiime metadata tabulate \
  --m-input-file ./deblur/demux-filter-stats-deblur.qza \
  --o-visualization ./results/visualizations/demux-filter-stats-deblur.qzv
```

```bash
qiime deblur visualize-stats \
  --i-deblur-stats ./deblur/demux-filter-stats-deblur.qza \
  --o-visualization ./results/visualizations/deblur-stats.qzv
```
